## Pre-flight checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I opened an issue first (or this is a trivial change)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] I self-reviewed the diff and removed debug code / dead comments
- [ ] If this changes user-facing behavior, I updated the relevant docs / dictionaries
- [ ] If this is a bug fix, I added a regression test
- [ ] If this changes the desktop app's UX, I attached a screenshot / recording above
